description: CompositionGreen floral print kurta made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, square neck with a buttoned chest placket, and has hakoba stitch detailing along the neckline, sleeve hems, chest placket and the length of the kurtaFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this green kurta from w! Look ethnically hip and fresh with the hakoba styled neckline, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
